title: Indulgent Filipino Ikura Halo Halo
description: A pungent and flaky Filipino dessert featuring ikura, cure, and dash-friendly ingredients in a halo halo form, this indulgent treat is sure to satisfy any sweet tooth. The combination of creamy milk, sweet fruits, and salty ikura creates a unique flavor experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chilled sweetened condensed milk and evaporated milk.
Stir in the ube halaya until well combined.
Add the toasted coconut strips, pinipig, and sesame seeds to the bowl and stir gently.
Spoon a layer of the milk mixture into individual serving glasses or bowls.
Top the milk layer with a spoonful of ikura, jackfruit, and a sprinkle of salt.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of milk on top.
Cover the glasses or bowls with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, give the halo halo a gentle stir and serve chilled.
